emergency_routing_rules.fallback_action: Take message, dispatch will call back within 15 minutes

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: collect details and schedule callback during business hours

call_transfer_rules.failure_message: I apologize, I'm unable to reach our team right now. I've recorded your information and someone will call you back shortly.

integration_constraints: Do not create work orders in ServiceTrade for sprinkler emergencies
after_hours_flow_summary: For emergencies, collect caller info and address, attempt transfer to on-call. For non-emergencies, collect details and confirm callback during business hours.
office_hours_flow_summary: Identify emergency vs routine, collect caller info, transfer to appropriate department or take message.
questions_or_unknowns: Exact after-hours transfer number not confirmed
notes: Client mentioned they get frequent false alarms - may need special handling logic
